message:
test(engine): add comprehensive proof schema enrichment test suite

Add thorough property tests for the proof_schema module covering:

- Copy semantics for ActivationStage and SignerRole enums
- Serde variant distinctness for OptimizationClass, ActivationStage,
  EquivalenceVerdict, TraceComparisonMethodology, and SignerRole
  ensuring no two variants serialize to the same JSON value
- Debug trait distinctness across enum variants
- Clone independence for SignerKeyId, InvarianceDigest, and
  OptimizationReceipt confirming mutations don't leak between clones
- JSON field-name stability ensuring serialized key names don't change
  across versions
- Display format validation for human-readable output
- Serde roundtrip scenarios for complex nested types

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
